text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pfg

Log:
  libsupc++: Fix typo in symbol map.

  This went mostly unnoticed with the deprecation of the GNU toolchain
  in tier 1 platforms. Fix it now for the rest.

  PR:		169901
  MFC after:	3 days
